name: Weather-Related Livestock Sale Deferral

eligibility.description: Applies to livestock (excluding poultry) sold solely due to weather conditions; replacement period is generally 4 years if in a designated assistance area.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Sales of draft, breeding, or dairy livestock in excess of normal practices due to drought, flood, or weather are treated as involuntary conversions, allowing for tax-deferred replacement.
